svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="HnU-sO-dRQ4PTUYNtBiq"> <mxGraphModel dx="788" dy="558" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="DashboardComponent
ReportesComponent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="210" x="270" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="«interface»
Reporte" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="210" x="270" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="+ calcularTotal(): number" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="210" x="270" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="Venta" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="190" x="170" y="363" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="..." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="190" x="170" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ calcularTotal(): number" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="170" y="436" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="Retorna precio_unitario
* cantidad directamente." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="220" x="155" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="34" edge="1" parent="1" source="30" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=none;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.2;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="ReporteDiario" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="240" x="420" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="- children: Venta[]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="240" x="420" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ add(v: Venta)
+ remove(v: Venta)
+ getChildren(): Venta[]
+ calcularTotal(): number" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="240" x="420" y="413" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=block;endFill=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.8;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#ffffc0;strokeColor=#999900;size=15;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="Delegar todo el trabajo
a detalle_ventas (hijos)." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="240" x="420" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="35" edge="1" parent="1" source="31" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=none;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CljoML9QpmCDEQSzsIsd-38" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=diamondThin;endFill=0;endSize=24;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="9" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" width="160" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="740" y="246" /> <mxPoint x="740" y="320" /> <mxPoint x="740" y="363" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="280" y="380" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="380" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
